creator: emz@norma.perm.ru
text:
And I also have an error in the LSI log:

07/07/16  3:04:26: C0:EVT#04219-07/07/16  3:04:26: 113=Unexpected sense: PD 07(e0x04/s11) Path 50030480091b514b, CDB: 00 00 00 00 00 00, Sense: 1/00/1d
Ъ7/07/16  3:04:26: C0:Raw Sense for PD 7: 70 00 01 00 00 00 00 0a 00 00 00 00 00 1d 00 00 00 00
Exit Code: 0x00

does it mean it's a controller/firmware issue ?
